steps.action: Verify schema.sql for FK constraint definition
steps.expected: CONSTRAINT fk_spikes_share FOREIGN KEY (share_id) REFERENCES shares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
steps.observed: FK constraint found in schema: share_id TEXT REFERENCES shares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE with explicit CONSTRAINT

steps.action: Test valid share_id INSERT via API
steps.observed: POST /spikes with valid share_id '5a0849ed-2653-46ca-bccc-244fbaebe779' returned 201 with spike ID '17b2ccc7-fb0b-439f-888a-8540a3d6fc0b'

steps.action: Test FK constraint enforcement at database level
steps.expected: INSERT with non-existent share_id fails with FK constraint error
steps.observed: Direct SQLite INSERT with share_id '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' failed with 'Runtime error near line 2: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed (19)'

evidence.schemaReference: schema.sql contains: CONSTRAINT fk_spikes_share FOREIGN KEY (share_id) REFERENCES shares(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
evidence.apiTest: POST /spikes with valid share_id succeeded, returned 201

steps.action: Verify shares table schema has no tier column
steps.expected: PRAGMA table_info(shares) does not list 'tier' column
steps.observed: shares table columns: id, slug, owner_token, owner_id, password_hash, password_salt, webhook_url, webhook_secret, created_at. 'tier' column is absent.

steps.action: Verify tier lookup uses JOIN to users table in code
steps.expected: Code shows 'SELECT s.*, u.tier FROM shares s JOIN users u ON s.owner_id = u.id' pattern
steps.observed: src/db/queries.ts getShareBySlug uses: SELECT s.id, s.slug, s.password_hash, s.password_salt, COALESCE(u.tier, 'free') as tier FROM shares s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.owner_id = u.id

evidence.schemaColumns: id, slug, owner_token, owner_id, password_hash, password_salt, webhook_url, webhook_secret, created_at
evidence.tierLookupCode: src/db/queries.ts line 133: COALESCE(u.tier, 'free') as tier via LEFT JOIN to users table

steps.action: Verify code uses COUNT(*) for spike counting
steps.expected: countSpikesByShareId function uses SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spikes WHERE share_id = ?
steps.observed: src/db/queries.ts countSpikesByShareId: 'SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM spikes WHERE share_id = ?'

steps.action: Verify shares table has no spike_count column
steps.expected: PRAGMA table_info(shares) does not list 'spike_count' column
steps.observed: spike_count column NOT found in shares table (confirmed via SQLite query)

steps.expected: List query calculates spike_count dynamically via subquery
steps.observed: src/db/queries.ts listSharesByOwner: '(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spikes WHERE share_id = s.id) as spike_count'

evidence.countQuery: src/db/queries.ts: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM spikes WHERE share_id = ?
evidence.listQuery: src/db/queries.ts: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spikes WHERE share_id = s.id) as spike_count
evidence.noDenormalizedColumn: spike_count column absent from shares table schema

steps.action: Verify code generates server-side UUID only
steps.expected: Code shows 'id: crypto.randomUUID()' without fallback to body.id
steps.observed: src/handlers/spikes.ts line 116: id: crypto.randomUUID(), // Server-generated, never trust client input

steps.action: Test that client-provided id is ignored
steps.expected: POST with body.id='hacked-id-123' returns different UUID
steps.observed: POST /spikes with '{"id":"hacked-id-123",...}' returned ID 'c674fe46-27de-43d9-839b-03087bb9a39a' (valid UUID v4, not the hacked value)

steps.action: Verify returned ID is valid UUID v4 format
steps.expected: Returned ID matches UUID v4 regex pattern
steps.observed: All returned IDs match UUID v4 pattern (e.g., c674fe46-27de-43d9-839b-03087bb9a39a)

evidence.codeReference: src/handlers/spikes.ts: id: crypto.randomUUID(), // Server-generated, never trust client input
evidence.clientIdIgnored: Posted body.id='hacked-id-123', received different UUID in response
evidence.uuidFormat: All returned IDs are valid UUID v4 format

steps.expected: {} returns 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR and field-level details for missing page and type

steps.action: Test invalid data type (number where string expected)
steps.expected: Returns 400 with field-level error for project field
steps.observed: HTTP 400: {"error":"Validation failed","code":"VALIDATION_ERROR","details":[{"field":"project","message":"Invalid input: expected string, received number"}]}

steps.action: Test invalid enum value for type
steps.expected: Returns 400 with error that type must be 'page' or 'element'
Returns 201 with ok: true and generated spike ID

evidence.emptyBody: POST {} → 400 with details for page and type fields
evidence.invalidType: POST with type='invalid' → 400 with 'Type must be page or element'
evidence.invalidDataType: POST with project=123 (number) → 400 with 'expected string, received number'
evidence.validRequest: POST with valid body → 201 with ok: true

steps.expected: Malformed JSON returns 400 with INVALID_JSON code

steps.action: Test invalid webhook URL (HTTP instead of HTTPS)
steps.expected: Returns 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR and field-level details
steps.observed: HTTP 400: {"error":"Validation failed","code":"VALIDATION_ERROR","details":[{"field":"webhook_url","message":"Webhook URL must be HTTPS and cannot point to localhost or private IP addresses"}]}

steps.expected: Returns 400 with validation error for private IP/localhost
steps.observed: HTTP 400: Same error as above for https://localhost/webhook

steps.action: Test valid share creation passes validation
steps.expected: Returns 201 with share URL and ID

evidence.validRequest: POST with valid metadata → 201 with share created

summary: Tested 6 reliability assertions: all passed. VAL-REL-001: FK constraint enforced at database level (SQLite error 19 on violation). VAL-REL-002: No tier column in shares table, tier lookup via JOIN to users. VAL-REL-003: COUNT(*) used for spike counting, no denormalized spike_count column. VAL-REL-004: Server-side UUID generation, client-provided id ignored. VAL-REL-005: Zod validation returns 400 with field-level details for invalid spike data. VAL-REL-006: Zod validation returns 400 for invalid share metadata including webhook URL validation.
